calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Dec-02-2019 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Oct-28-2019 Continued To Dec-02-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Liam O'Connor for Petitioner.

The Court noted that it does not know what the ex parte application says as it was not attached, and that no waiver of bond is on file. Mr. O'Connor stated they did not proceed with an ex parte application, filed a notice petition instead. The Court stated it could grant today with bond or continue for waiver of bond. Mr. O'Connor stated he will get waivers and consents and requested telephonic appearance if further appearance is needed. The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee is continued to December 2, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of amendment to petition with consents attached.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.
